h2: Any space. Any season. Any style. Electric fireplaces from SimpliFire are easy to install at any time, function beautifully with or without heat, and complement a variety of interior design styles from modern to traditional. With the touch of a button, you lose the fuss of a wood-burning fireplace and get all the enjoyment of an eco-friendly, fireside experience.

paragraphs: Any space. Any season. Any style. Electric fireplaces from SimpliFire are easy to install at any time, function beautifully with or without heat, and complement a variety of interior design styles from modern to traditional. With the touch of a button, you lose the fuss of a wood-burning fireplace and get all the enjoyment of an eco-friendly, fireside experience.

The Triton electric fireplace is a showstopper with its impressive 20" tall glass and modern, built-in design. Available in 50", 65" and 78" lengths and three configurations, (one-sided, two-sided corner, three-sided bay) it adapts to any space and style. You can even link multiple units together for unlimited length, extra warmth and bold, continuous flames across a striking feature wall.

The Format is the best electric fireplace for sleek, minimal style that requires zero hassle to hang. With its floating mantel, this white electric fireplace provides glow from LED flames, as well as moody mantel downlighting. Enjoy it year-round with or without heat. Available in 43-inch, 50-inch, and 60-inch fireplace widths.

The Scion is a linear electric fireplace with a sophisticated design, including a modern, minimal front trim, no visible heater, and a built-in look with 16" tall glass for a stunning view. Your choice of crystal media or driftwood logs complements vibrant LED flames and customizable ember bed colors, creating a captivating ambiance that’s tailored to your interior design style. Available in 43 and 55-inch widths.

Adding the traditional look of a fireplace to your home has never been easier thanks to the Built-in electric fireplace from SimpliFire. A masonry-style interior, textured log set, and flame height adjustments give you all the ambiance of a real fire with the convenience of pressing a button. Available in 30-inch and 36-inch fireplace widths.

The SimpliFire Forum outdoor electric fireplace expands your livable space. Designed to withstand long sun-exposure and weather the elements, the Forum frees up your outdoor area of propane tanks, gas lines and wood. Enjoy the flexibility and ambiance of placing this heat-free fire feature on any deck or patio. Available in 43-inch and 55-inch fireplace widths.

With the modern design of the Allusion Platinum, you can easily create a cozy atmosphere with an optional build-out kit or wall-mount kit, or enjoy a built-in, flush design installed by pros. Use this electric fireplace year-round, with or without heat. Available in 50-inch, 60-inch, and 72-inch fireplace widths.

Enjoy total personalization of your electric fireplace. Choose from multiple fire backdrops with DigitalSpark™ technology, enhanced by a range of built-in sound effects. Plus, enjoy the flexibility of installing the Inception almost anywhere, either directly into the wall or with the Wescott mantel kit. Available in a 36-inch fireplace width.

Lifelike digital flames flicker and crackle over glowing logs and embers, delivering all the cozy feels within a modern fireplace design. A sleek profile and subtle heat vents keep the focus on the fire, while slide-in installation and an optional build-out kit make it easy to integrate beautifully. Choose your favorite flame look, control it by remote or app, and enjoy with or without heat all year long. Available in 50, 60, 78 and 100-inch widths.

Convert a drafty, dated fireplace into an eco-friendly, efficient source of warmth with an electric fireplace insert. The electric insert fits directly into a wood fireplace opening with a surround kit or any framed opening with the self-trimming design. Available in 25-inch, 30-inch and 35-inch insert widths.

The Allusion Slim electric fireplace beautifully bridges technology and style. The ultra-sleek, four-inch depth is one of the slimmest out there, able to be completely recessed into a 2x4 or 2x6 wall, without taking up additional floor space. It’s easy to add this fireplace in almost any room (no construction needed) with the optional wall-mount & surround kit. Available in 40-inch, 50-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.
Discover how easy installing a SimpliFire electric fireplace is with a step-by-step how-to, created in partnership with design experts at Hunker.
Wondering how to choose an electric fireplace? Our buying guide has everything you need to know, from budget options to luxury looks.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.
